api/index.py: Replace libsql-experimental native HTTP client with stdlib Turso HTTP client (reverted)
Fix row_factory: add hasattr check for libsql Connection objects
Add _ensure_dict() helper for cross-backend row-to-dict conversion
Add _TursoDictCursor and _TursoDictConnection to wrap libsql tuple results into dicts
requirements.txt: Remove libsql-experimental from root requirements (build env is CPython 3.14, no wheel)
pyproject.toml: Add libsql-experimental to root pyproject.toml (API runtime is Python 3.12, has wheel)
backend/tests/test_production_truth.py: Update test to assert libsql-experimental is NOT in requirements.txt (moved to pyproject.toml)

fixes_made: Build failure: libsql-experimental no wheel on CPython 3.14 → moved to pyproject.toml (runtime Python 3.12)
Runtime error: 'builtins.Connection' object has no attribute 'row_factory' → hasattr check + dict wrapper
